title: Ketone
description: A mod that adds useful things
body:
![Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/toby7002/Ketone/main/assets/logo.png)  
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=GitHub&color=f8f8f2&labelColor=90FFA7&style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/toby7002/Ketone)

Ketone adds a lot of useful things (items, tools) that make your game easier.  
To learn the mod, I suggest checking out the guidebook which can be crafted with 1 book and 1 quartz.

### Contents
- Blocks:
  - Angel Block: This block doesn't need another block to place itself on.
- Items:
  - Glass cutter: Break and drop glass.
  - Ice breaker: Break and drop ice.
- Resources:
  - Polished quartz: A material that used to make tools that involves sharpness.
  - Tiny coal/charcoal: Provides just single operation in furnaces
